CREATE TABLE test_table (value String, scale UInt8);
SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault(value, scale) AS decimal_value, toTypeName(decimal_value) FROM test_table;
SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault('Inf', 2, CAST('-1', 'Decimal256(2)')) AS b, toTypeName(b);
SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault('NaN', 0, CAST('10', 'Decimal256(0)')) AS c, toTypeName(c);
SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault('0.001', 3) AS f, toTypeName(f) WHERE f < 1;
SELECT (SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault(value, scale) FROM test_table WHERE value = '123.456') + (SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault('0.025', 2));
CREATE TABLE another_table (num String, scale UInt8);
SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault(num, scale, CAST('0', 'Decimal256(2)')) FROM another_table;
SELECT a.decimal_value, b.num FROM (SELECT toDecimal256OrDefault(value, scale) AS decimal_value FROM test_table) AS a JOIN another_table AS b ON a.decimal_value > 0;
